name: Postiz Social Scheduler
description_en: Schedule and publish posts to 28+ social and chat channels (X, LinkedIn, Reddit, Instagram, Facebook, Threads, YouTube, TikTok, Mastodon, Bluesky, Telegram, Discord, Slack and more) through the open-source Postiz CLI.
description_zh: 通过开源 Postiz CLI 把帖子排期并发布到 28+ 社交与聊天渠道(X、LinkedIn、Reddit、Instagram、Facebook、Threads、YouTube、TikTok、Mastodon、Bluesky、Telegram、Discord、Slack 等)。
long_en: Wraps the Postiz CLI so the agent can connect accounts and schedule cross-channel posts from natural language; Postiz itself is self-hostable open source.
long_zh: 封装 Postiz CLI,让 agent 用自然语言连接账号、跨渠道排期发帖;Postiz 本身是可自托管的开源项目。
sec_note_en: Installs the Postiz npm CLI and posts on your behalf to the social accounts you connect; needs a Postiz instance and a POSTIZ_API_URL credential. Review scheduled content before it publishes.
sec_note_zh: 会安装 Postiz npm CLI 并代表你向已连接的社交账号发帖;需要一个 Postiz 实例与 POSTIZ_API_URL 凭据。发布前请审阅排期内容。
